## 2024-05-19 - [Fix persistent stream cache validity]
**Learning:** Hardcoded TTLs (e.g., 5 hours) for temporary signed URLs (like YouTube video links) fail unpredictably due to dynamic rotation and expiration generated by the origin server.
**Action:** Always parse the exact `expire` token natively provided by the service (via URL parameter or path segment) to determine true cache validity, and apply a temporal safety buffer (e.g., 10 minutes) before allowing access to prevent late failures during actual playback.
